declarations.name: MdFilledButton
declarations.description: Material Design 3 filled button component. Use for the primary, most important action on a screen.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether or not the button is disabled.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL that the link button points to.

members.name: trailingIcon
members.description: Whether to place the icon after the label (trailing) instead of before it (leading).

events.name: click
events.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: An optional icon to display in the button.

cssProperties.name: --md-filled-button-container-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the button's container.

cssProperties.name: --md-filled-button-label-text-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the button's label text.

cssProperties.name: --md-filled-button-container-shape
cssProperties.description: The shape of the button's container.

declarations.name: MdOutlinedButton
declarations.description: Material Design 3 outlined button component. Use for secondary actions or when the action requires less emphasis.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether or not the button is disabled.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL that the link button points to.

members.name: trailingIcon
members.description: Whether to place the icon after the label (trailing) instead of before it (leading).

events.name: click
events.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: An optional icon to display in the button.

cssProperties.name: --md-outlined-button-label-text-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the button's label text.

cssProperties.name: --md-outlined-button-outline-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the button's outline.

declarations.name: MdCheckbox
declarations.description: Material Design 3 checkbox component. Checkboxes allow users to select one or more items from a set.

members.name: checked
members.description: Whether or not the checkbox is selected.

members.name: indeterminate
members.description: Whether or not the checkbox is indeterminate.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether or not the checkbox is disabled.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the checkbox's checked state changes.

cssProperties.name: --md-checkbox-selected-container-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the checkbox's container when selected.

cssProperties.name: --md-checkbox-selected-icon-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the checkbox's icon when selected.

declarations.name: MdDialog
declarations.description: Material Design 3 dialog component. Dialogs provide important prompts in a user flow.

members.name: returnValue
members.description: Gets or sets the dialog's return value, usually to indicate which button a user pressed to close it.

events.name: cancel
events.description: Fired when the dialog is cancelled.

cssProperties.name: --md-dialog-container-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the dialog's container.

cssProperties.name: --md-dialog-headline-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the dialog's headline text.
